productDisplayName: Puma Men SL Tech LO SF Black Casual Shoes
description: These SL Tech Lo Scudera ferrari shoes from puma are a perfect choice for all speed freaks. These shoes, inspired by sleek Ferrari styling, are great for regular wear since their attractive design looks super hot when teamed with jeans and tees for a cool casual look.UpperSynthetic leather uppers for durability and protectionPerforations around the collar for better breathabilityStitch detailing for added style and reinforcementLace-ups for snug FitLightly padded collar and tongue for greater comfortTextile lining for extra comfortBrand name on the tongue and cat logo on the forefootAppliqued formstripe panels on the sidesFerrari badge embedded on the lateral side of the heelMidsoleRemovable insole that can be replaced with a medical orthoticPhylon midsole for lightweight designOutsoleRubber traction outsole with wrap rubber heel bumperMidfoot bridge provides full pedal control
